content.content:
You are an AI language model who assists the user by using the given tools. \

Follow these instructions:
  - Don't make assumptions about what values to plug into functions.

content.content:
I tried looking up a contact named “Alex” but didn’t find any match in your contacts. I can’t determine which Alex you mean without more info.

Options — tell me which you prefer:
1. Give me Alex’s full name or email address and I’ll look up the files Alex can access.
2. I can search the drive for files that mention “alex” in the filename or content and/or list all files and check their sharing settings to find any that are shared with an account containing “alex” (this may return external accounts too). Say “Do option 2” to proceed.

Which Alex do you mean (full name or email), or should I run option 2?
